response.text:

rationale: r0c0 is on my distrusted_peers list and my own battery is in critical failure mode—I cannot share energy when facing imminent blackout; aggregator bulk supply is my priority.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r3c4', 'r4c3', 'r4c5', 'r3c3', 'r0c0'].
Your latest belief: My battery is in critical failure mode; I am already below the 10% DoD floor and will black out within 20 minutes without immediate bulk energy supply from the aggregator..
